steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for a meaningful contrast between the two sculptures. The most significant difference is subject matter: Frudakis's Freedom Sculpture depicts human figures, while McCracken's Diminish and Ascend depicts an architectural element.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — In contrast to Frudakis's *Freedom Sculpture*, McCracken's *Diminish and Ascend* is displayed in a public place.: does not accurately identify a distinguishing difference between the two works. ✗
  • Choice B — Frudakis's *Freedom Sculpture*, unlike McCracken's *Diminish and Ascend*, depicts human subjects.: correctly identifies that Frudakis's work includes human figures while McCracken's does not. ✓
  • Choice C — *Freedom Sculpture* by Frudakis and *Diminish and Ascend* by McCracken are two examples of public art.: does not establish a contrast between the two. ✗
  • Choice D — McCracken's sculpture *Diminish and Ascend*, which depicts a staircase that appears to ascend into the clouds, is on display in Christchurch, New Zealand.: describes only McCracken's sculpture; it does not contrast it with Frudakis's Freedom Sculpture. ✗
That confirms B is correct.
